meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop chasing clients without proof. Use this SaaS starter kit and expert workflow with Antigravity and Claude Code to build a high-converting MVP fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; you don't need past work, you need a high-velocity MVP. By leveraging a SaaS starter kit, you compress months of development into days. Combine Antigravity’s architectural scaffolding with Claude Code’s autonomous execution to ship a production-ready product that generates tangible revenue immediately.
content.intro:
The screen glows, cold and empty. You have the vision, the drive, and the technical aptitude, but the market demands a portfolio you haven't built yet. Every day spent waiting for the 'perfect' project is a day your competitors are capturing the market share you deserve. The cycle of needing work to get work is a trap designed to keep founders stagnant.

Relief arrives not in the form of a resume, but in the form of a finished, functional product. By utilizing a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you bypass the boilerplate and jump straight to the features that drive conversion. We aren't just writing code; we are building a machine that validates your business model and proves your expertise through cold, hard execution.

steps.title: Define the Value-First MVP
steps.description: Identify the one feature that solves a burning pain point. Strip away the fluff and focus on the core user journey that leads to a payment event.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-conversion SaaS project structure focused on [Niche]. Include user authentication, Stripe integration, and a landing page that emphasizes ROI over features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize project scaffolding for a Stripe-enabled SaaS MVP with user auth.'

steps.title: Architect the Database Schema
steps.description: A robust schema is the spine of your SaaS. Ensure your data model supports scalability and rapid feature iteration from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a normalized PostgreSQL schema for a subscription-based SaaS, including tables for users, subscription_status, and usage_logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate and apply Prisma schema for user subscription management.'

steps.title: Implement High-Velocity Auth
steps.description: Don't reinvent the wheel. Use industry-standard authentication to ensure security and trust without sacrificing your speed to market.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate secure authentication flow using NextAuth.js with Google OAuth and email magic links for a clean onboarding experience.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure NextAuth.js providers and secure API routes.'

steps.title: Connect the Payment Gateway
steps.description: The goal is revenue. Hook up Stripe webhooks to handle subscription lifecycles, ensuring your MVP is ready to collect payments immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust Stripe webhook handler that listens for checkout.session.completed and updates the user subscription status in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement Stripe webhook handler in /api/webhooks/stripe.'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Ship to production instantly. An un-deployed product is just a hobby; a live URL is a portfolio piece that earns money.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment configuration for Vercel/Railway including environment variable setup and production build scripts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Review project for production readiness and generate deployment documentation.'

pro_tips: Always optimize for 'Time-to-First-Dollar' over feature parity; nobody cares about your code quality if the product doesn't solve a problem.
Use mock data early to build the UI, then swap for real API endpoints once the core business logic is validated.
Leverage Claude Code to write your integration tests; test coverage is the ultimate proof of professionalism for potential clients.
Keep your tech stack standard (Next.js/Postgres/Stripe); proprietary stacks confuse users and increase your maintenance burden.
Treat your landing page as part of the app; if it doesn't convert, the underlying SaaS features are irrelevant.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on acquiring your first 10 users through direct outreach to validate your pricing model before building additional features.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the drawer and start building for the market. By following this framework, you transform from a developer into a SaaS founder with a tangible asset. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
